titleStmt.title: SII 15.529: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 529. (B.K. No. 218 of 1927-28.) BƒÄDƒÄMI, BADAMI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the top of the cavern called Pa√±chali·πÖgapa·∏çi, near Cave No. IV.
This is dated ≈öaka 955, ≈örƒ´mukha, ƒÄsvija ≈õu. 5, Sunday, corresponding to 1033 A.D., September 1. The weekday, however, was Saturday.

It states that Pergga·∏çe Kamchiya ChƒÅvayya, a subordinate of Nelag≈ç·π≠emalla KommarƒÅja, had the image of MallikƒÅrjuna consecrated on the southern side of the Bh≈´tƒì≈õvara temple at Agastya Pushpagiri.
